project.name: micro-jainslee :: adapter suite
project.description:
Aggregator for the framework-specific adapter sub-modules. Each sub-module exposes the same MicroSleeContainer, EventRouter, TimerPort and ACNF beans through the host framework's DI container: - adapter-quarkus (Quarkus 3.x extension — deployment + runtime) - adapter-springboot (Spring Boot 3 starter) - adapter-jakartaee (Jakarta EE 9 @Singleton @Startup EJB)
Applications pick exactly one adapter at deploy time. Production USSD builds typically use adapter-springboot; edge / R&D builds typically use adapter-quarkus; legacy Jakarta EE clients use adapter-jakartaee.
